info.description: API REST for LiveCart SaaS — live commerce order detection, cart consolidation, and integrations.
info.title: LiveCart API

post.description: Accepts an invitation and adds the user to the store

get.description: Returns invitation details for the accept page (public endpoint)

post.description: Creates a new store with owner membership

get.description: Returns the store associated with the authenticated user

put.description: Updates the store associated with the authenticated user
Updates the cart settings for the authenticated user's store
Updates a specific store (requires store access)
Updates the cart settings for a specific store (requires store access)
put.summary: Update cart settings for a store

get.description: Returns customers with filtering, pagination, and sorting
Returns aggregated statistics for all customers in the store
Returns a single customer by their platform user ID
Returns monthly revenue data for the current year
Returns main dashboard metrics (revenue, orders, products, lives)
Returns the top 5 best selling products
Lists all integrations for the current store

post.description: Creates a new external service integration

get.description: Returns the OAuth authorization URL for the provider
Retrieves an integration by ID
Retrieves the current status of a payment

post.description: Initiates a refund for a payment
Tests if the integration credentials are valid and the provider is reachable

get.description: Returns all invitations for the store

post.description: Creates an invitation for a user to join the store
Generates a new token and resends the invitation email

get.description: Returns live sessions with filtering, pagination, and sorting

post.description: Creates a live session for the current store

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for all live sessions in the store
Returns a single live session by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing live session by its UUID

delete.description: Deletes a live session by its UUID

post.description: Ends an active live session and finalizes all pending carts

get.description: Returns all platform IDs associated with a live session
get.summary: List platforms for a live session

post.description: Associates a new platform live ID with the session (for crash recovery)
post.summary: Add a platform to a live session

delete.description: Disassociates a platform live ID from the session
delete.summary: Remove a platform from a live session

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's membership info for the current store
get.summary: Get current user in store context

get.description: Returns all members of the store

delete.description: Removes a member from the store (owner/admin only)

patch.description: Updates the role of a store member (owner/admin only)

get.description: Returns orders with filtering, pagination, and sorting

parameters.description: Search by customer handle or order ID
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for all orders in the store
Returns a single order by its UUID with items

patch.description: Updates order status and/or payment status

get.description: Returns products with filtering, pagination, and sorting

parameters.description: Filter by source (manual, bling, tiny, shopify)
parameters.name: externalSource

post.description: Creates a product for the current store. Keyword is auto-generated if not provided.

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for all products in the store
Returns a single product by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing product by its UUID

delete.description: Deletes a product by its UUID

post.description: Creates/updates user and returns the single membership for the authenticated user (1 user = 1 store)
Receives and processes Clerk webhook events for user sync

get.description: Verifies the webhook endpoint with Meta's challenge-response mechanism

post.description: Receives and processes Instagram live_comments and messages events

get.description: Exchanges authorization code for access token and creates/updates integration

post.description: Receives and processes Mercado Pago payment notifications

get.description: Exchanges authorization code for access token and creates/updates integration

post.description: Receives and processes Tiny ERP notifications

stockValue.description: sum of price * stock in cents

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format: Bearer <token>
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
